caption: #505: modifier-key shortcuts. Selecting the Spearmen (spawn formation Tight), T cycles the formation forward (Tight -> Loose, visibly wider spacing); Shift+T cycles the other way, stepping back (Loose -> Tight) -- the same tab/shift-tab parallelism the issue asks for. Shift+Y and Shift+X reverse the form-up split and group-attack-mode cycles the same way (see the PR description).
